title: Mine-Net
description: A plugin that extends the functionality of the Free Mine-Net.eu Minecraft Web-Builder and management tool
body:
![Logo](https://mine-net.eu/assets/img/2048cropped.png)
**Welcome to Mine-net Beta!**

A new service offering PWA enabled free website builder/hosting that links ingame with your server easy and fast! Including Full ban management News stafflisting worldmap embedding and much more!

Start building with the custom build CMS building your website in minutes instead of days!
With a ever growing list of functionality extending from discord to minecraft to bungeecord.
Intergrating everything together!



(plugin works on 1.16 and up)

![Preview1](https://mine-net.eu/spigot/page1.png)
![Preview2](https://mine-net.eu/spigot/page2.png)


Demo: https://minecraft.bitcubes.eu/
website: https://mine-net.eu
Features: https://mine-net.eu/features.php
Start right away: https://mine-net.eu/login.php
Discord support and feedback: https://mine-net.eu/discord.php
